content.en:
"Since you have chosen the True Lin form, I will pass on this secret method inheritance to you!"

Airplanes!!!!

Proz's claws pressed against Ye Tian's eyebrows, and countless knowledge poured into it along with the breath of the ultimate particle.

Soon, Ye Tian obtained the inheritance of the true lin-shaped ~ state.

"Go and cultivate, I hope you can do it. "

Proz Road.

"Thank you, Lord Plotz!"

Ye Tian retreated.

......

After going back.

Ye Tian began to study the secret method of the True Lin Form, there are four forms of the True Lin Form, the first form is the Qinglin form, the second form is the Red Lin form, the third form is the Purple Lin form, and the fourth form is the Golden Lin form.

Of course, the third form and the fourth form are not to be thought about at the moment, it is impossible to practice in the emperor-level realm, and it is very good to be able to practice the first form in the emperor-level.

And the Qinglin form, the first form of the True Lin Form Secret Method, once practiced, whether it is physical strength, speed, or strength, will skyrocket, and it has terrifying combat power.

Of course, it is naturally very difficult to practice the secret method of the True Lin Form.

Ye Tian briefly browsed this secret method, and felt that the content of the secret method was extremely mysterious.

Even if he wanted to practice, it was not so easy!!!

However, he can deduce and analyze with the help of items like the Demon Ancient Mirror, coupled with the attempts to copy the body again and again, there is still hope that he can practice the first form of the True Lin Form in a short period of time.

Time flies.

Ye Tian was still cultivating here, and the Golden God Department had already surrounded the Dragon Disciple Tribe's headquarters in the Qinghuan Abyss, and kept attacking, making it impossible for the Dragon Disciple Tribe to compete with the Golden God Department at all.

At this point, the situation has been completely reversed.

And.

The Golden God Department can also arrange a large array outside the headquarters of the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and use countless large arrays to attack the headquarters here again and again.

Without the support of resources, after a period of time, this place will inevitably be breached.

At that time, these emperor-level existences will definitely die, and the Golden God Department will be able to win this war.

However, Aoi is a little impatient.

Ye Tian fled, and he couldn't chase and kill Ye Tian in the outside world, otherwise the ancient demon-level existence of the Dragon Disciple Tribe could protect Ye Tian.

Moreover, the battlefield agreed upon by the two sides is in the abyss of Qinghuan.

In desperation, he could only assist the Golden God Department to break through the headquarters of the Dragon Disciple Tribe as soon as possible and win the victory before he could leave here.

......

The Dragon Disciple Tribe was panicked, but they had no other way, after all, Ye Tian couldn't defeat Aoi at the moment, and there was no point in letting Ye Tian force him over.

The gap in strength can sometimes be reversed by not a single treasure, so it makes no sense for them to give Ye Tian a treasure.

Ye Tian was actually not in a hurry, it was just a big deal that he fled and left the territory of the Golden God Ministry.

This is not his era, his era, offended the ultimate supreme, the ultimate supreme can find all his copied bodies at a glance, and it is very urgent to spy on all of him.

But in this era, the ancient demon-level existence comparable to the ultimate supreme cannot achieve this level, it is suppressed by the origin of this era, and the ancient demon-level existence does not have the ability to do everything.

Therefore, as long as he escaped, it would not be easy for an ancient demon-level existence, or even a peak ancient demon-level existence, to find him.

Of course, if he can win, he still wants to win, after all, he has to keep the Eagle Department.

The Dragonsman Tribe can walk, but the Eagle Department is not easy to walk.

Therefore, he has to train to the true form as much as possible to defeat Aoi.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian practiced hard.

As a result, he lost again and again.

Every failure is an injury to the physical body, and if there are many failures, the physical body will be seriously injured, and there is no way to continue cultivating at all.

This is also the reason why Proz thinks that Ye Tian has no way to cultivate in a short time, because if he fails a few more times, he will not be able to continue cultivating, how can he practice in a sufficient time to become a true lin form and help the Dragon Disciple Tribe turn the situation around?

But Ye Tian's copy body was scrapped and could be re-copied, so he didn't worry about physical problems.

Time has passed since one ancient demon epoch after another.

this day.

And this time it also made the Dragon Disciple tribe suffer heavy losses, and in the years that followed, Aoi stayed at the headquarters of the Golden God Department to cultivate, unless Ye Tian entered the abyss of Qinghuan, he would not make a move.

And the dragon tribe has suffered such heavy losses, if there is no way to defeat Aoi and Wei, then the outcome of this war has already been decided.

The Dragons are also looking for reinforcements, such as looking for an emperor who is no less than Aoi, but they have no connections and can't be contacted at all.

As if, the end has been decided.

And at the moment.

Ye Tian was still not in a hurry to cultivate the True Lin Form, and with many failures, he became more and more experienced, and gradually gained a certain understanding of how to cultivate the True Lin Form.

this day.

Ye Tian finally practiced the first form of the True Lin Form, the Qinglin Form.

Rumble!!!!

The ultimate particles in his whole body began to change, gradually becoming stronger, and his body changed a little, about several times that of before, and his whole body became stronger, and endless ultimate particle energy was absorbed into his body.

Moreover, his body has changed, and a lot of scaly cuticles have appeared on his body, and there are two horns on his head, but the whole is still in a humanoid state.

"It's done, the first form of the True Lin Form, although it is a preliminary practice, but with my True Lin Form, coupled with the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm Prototype that has been promoted over the years, I should be able to defeat or suppress Aoi. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he informed the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon that he had cultivated into the True Lin form.

......

Tribe of Dragons.

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon was still discussing with several other Ancient Demon-level existences, his face full of sadness.

Suddenly.

He received a message from Ye Tian.

"Good news, news came from the sky, he actually practiced into the True Lin form!!!"

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon was shocked.

"What, he has cultivated the True Lin Form Secret Method in such a short period of time?"

The other Ancient Demon Rank levels were also shocked.

In their opinion, within the 10,000 Ancient Demon Era, it is impossible for Ye Tian to practice, this is unrealistic!

But Ye Tian broke their cognition and practiced into a Zhenlin form that was relatively difficult to practice.

In this way, they have hope of winning.

Soon, Ye Tian came.

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon let Ye Tian cast his True Lin form, and Ye Tian really cast it, showing an incomparably terrifying combat power.

"Hahaha, great, I'll organize the emperors to enter the Qinghuan Abyss again and counterattack the Golden God Department!" said the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon.
